function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_27__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the 27-04-2026 invoice here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email file written successfully; verification check: attachment path was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity email, YAML subject quoting correct. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md for Claudia with the requested 2026-04-27 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task executed end-to-end: identified next inbox item, verified sender against canonical entity, drafted resend email with requested invoice attachment, and deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing its request.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound resend email draft to Claudia with the requested 2026-04-27 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, resolved sender/recipient via entity primary_contact_email, wrote outbound record in outbox using sending-email schema, and deleted processed inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to resend the invoice for 27-04-2026 from Helios. The canonical sender in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md is claudia@helios-tax.example, which matches 10_entities/cast/claudia.md primary_contact_email. The requested invoice exists at 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_27__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md and was attached in the outbound draft. After fulfilling the request, the inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
